ham.subject: Your recent transaction from XYZ Bank
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Aapke account (Account No: 123456789) se 07-Apr-2024 ko 10:45 AM par ₹5,000 ka transaction hua hai, jo ABC Retail ko gaya. Agar yeh aapne nahi kiya hai, to turant 1800-123-456 par call kare.

Thank you for banking with us.

Regards,
XYZ Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required Regarding Your Gift Card
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

I hope you are fine. This is [Name], CEO of XYZ Corp. We have a problem with a recent Amazon gift card purchase. Please send us the transaction details and give us a new gift card to the address below:

123, Main Street, Mumbai

If you don't respond within 24 hours, we will have to take action.

Thank you.

Regards,
[Name]
CEO, XYZ Corp
